__fixture__.name: managed_mirror_badge_group
__fixture__.scenario: An enterprise mirror copy is inspectable in review, but its managed upstream remains canonical. The badge group makes managed/mirrored state distinct from generic read-only and exposes detach as the next reviewed path.

source_of_truth_relation.relation_label: The enterprise registry upstream remains canonical; this object is a managed mirror copy.

write_authority.authority_summary: Local edits are not the official repair path; refresh, detach, or request approval through the managed owner.
